hero.headline: Wander
hero.subheadline: Discover flight deals to destinations that match your vibe — not just your schedule.

items.title: Discover by Vibe
items.body: Beach escapes, mountain retreats, city adventures — find flights to places that match how you want to feel, not just where the map says to go.

items.title: Real-Time Prices
items.body: Live flight pricing from hundreds of airlines. Set your budget and dates — or stay open and let deals surprise you.

items.title: Travel Together
items.body: Plan trips with friends in one place. Share ideas, vote on destinations, and book as a group without the group-chat chaos.

download.headline: Your next trip starts here.
download.subheadline: Free to download. No subscription. Just better travel.
